description_long: This object is a whole avocado with a rough, pebbly green skin, covered in small yellowish dots and occasional darker spots. The surface texture is uneven and bumpy, typical of a Hass avocado, and the skin appears thick and slightly glossy in some areas. The shape is broadly oval, tapering slightly towards one end, with a small, light brown stem visible at the narrower tip. The coloration is predominantly a deep green, with some areas showing lighter or darker patches, indicating natural ripening and minor blemishes. The avocado's size and proportions suggest it is fresh and uncut, with no visible damage or openings. The object is isolated against a plain white background, emphasizing its contours and surface details.
description: A whole, oval-shaped avocado with rough, bumpy green skin and a small stem at one end. The surface is dotted and slightly glossy, with minor blemishes and color variations.
description_view_0: The avocado is seen from above, showing its rounded top and the full extent of its bumpy, green skin.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the oval shape and the uneven, pebbly texture of the skin, with some lighter and darker green patches.
description_view_2: The narrower end of the avocado is visible, featuring a small, light brown stem and a more pronounced taper.
description_view_3: Another side view, showing the broadest part of the avocado and the distribution of small yellowish dots and minor blemishes.
attribute_skin_blemishes: small dark spots and minor discoloration patches
